entries.title: Missing Creator command surface
entries.scope: nexus42 creator subcommand — register, status, use, list, pair, unpair, logout, credentials rotate
entries.target: Added Task 6: Creator Command Module to plan

entries.title: Missing Manuscript command surface
entries.scope: nexus42 manuscript subcommand — status, phase, output, promote, verify
entries.target: Added Task 7: Manuscript Command Module to plan

entries.title: Missing Research command surface
entries.scope: nexus42 research subcommand — scan, list, extract
entries.target: Added Task 8: Research Command Module (V1.0 minimal) to plan

entries.title: Auth model covers only single-user tokens, missing dual-subject auth
entries.scope: Auth module — needs User tokens + Creator API keys as separate subjects
entries.target: Task 3 redesigned: split into user_auth.rs and creator_auth.rs for dual-subject auth

entries.title: SQLite connection per request (performance impact)
entries.scope: crates/nexus42d/src/workspace/mod.rs:62-72 — WorkspaceState::db() opens new SQLite connection per request instead of using connection pool
entries.target: V1.1 — add r2d2 or deadpool-sqlite connection pooling for production load handling
entries.closure_note: Resolved by Plan A (2026-04-06-foundation-hardening). See commit 1b8e849.

entries.title: SQLite schema duplication across CLI and daemon
entries.scope: crates/nexus42/src/commands/creator.rs:273, research.rs:132, crates/nexus42d/src/workspace/mod.rs:122 — creators and reference_sources tables defined in 3 places
entries.target: V1.1 — extract schema definitions to shared module or centralize SQLite operations through daemon API
entries.closure_note: Resolved by Plan A (2026-04-06-foundation-hardening). See commit 1b8e849.

entries.title: Inconsistent error propagation across command handlers
entries.scope: Multiple command handlers use `.unwrap_or_default()` on HTTP responses, silently swallowing errors
entries.target: V1.1 — standardize error propagation with logging before fallback, extract helper methods in errors.rs
entries.closure_note: Resolved by Plan A (2026-04-06-foundation-hardening). See commit 1b8e849.

entries.title: Missing workspace validation before operations
entries.scope: Command handlers (init, creator, manuscript) don't validate workspace state before performing operations
entries.target: V1.1 — add workspace state validation checks to prevent operations on uninitialized or corrupted workspaces
entries.closure_note: Resolved by Plan A (2026-04-06-foundation-hardening). See commit 1b8e849.

entries.title: Unsafe unwrap in error paths
entries.scope: Multiple instances of `.unwrap()` in production code paths that could panic on unexpected errors
entries.target: V1.1 — replace unwrap with proper error handling using Result types and error_chain/thiserror
entries.closure_note: Resolved by Plan A (2026-04-06-foundation-hardening). See commit 1b8e849.

entries.title: Concurrent workspace access race condition
entries.scope: Mutex<Option<Connection>> pattern in workspace state may cause race conditions under concurrent access
entries.target: V1.1 — use async-aware RwLock or switch to connection pool pattern to handle concurrent access safely
entries.closure_note: Resolved by Plan A (2026-04-06-foundation-hardening). See commit 1b8e849.
